name: Minera Alamos Inc.
description: Minera Alamos Inc. is a growing North American gold production company with the Pan Operating Complex in White Pine County, Nevada, as its flagship producing asset. The company is also advancing the Gold Rock heap leach project in Nevada, the Santana project in Sonora, Mexico, and the La Fortuna project, with a US$75 million revolving credit facility secured in March 2026.
